basis.target_market: Retail traders, prop-firm traders, forex/MT4-MT5 traders, ByBit-futures crypto traders. Mobile-first (iOS + Android). 12,000+ active traders. Global, English-speaking. Positions itself as 'mobile-first psychology-driven' alternative to TradeZella/TraderSync.
basis.pricing_model: Freemium. Free tier (manual journaling, no card required). Paid plans from $2.99/week. Specific monthly/annual price tiers not transparently listed in marketing — emphasis on app-store subscription model.

ai_features.feature_name: AI Psychology Coach / AI Emotional Analysis / Trading Plan Builder
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-period (per-session and post-trade) emotion analysis; per-trader rule synthesis (AI generates trading plan from style and goals). Less per-setup focused.
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid leaning push. AI auto-analyzes after each trading session and surfaces emotional patterns; AI also enforces psychology rules every session (push). Users can also query for insights (pull).
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not explicitly stated; testimonials mention pattern detection 'after 3 weeks' of use. [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not specified. Likely third-party LLM (OpenAI or similar) — no own-API-key option visible. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: In-app cards, push notifications, weekly summaries on mobile. Conversational AI mentor delivers post-session insights. Simple metrics (win rate, R:R, drawdown, time-of-day) presented as digestible mobile UI.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Inferred from marketing: 'What emotional patterns are draining your account?', 'Did you follow your psychology rules?', 'After 3+ losses today, are you about to revenge-trade?', 'Are you oversizing after wins?'. The AI is positioned around fear / greed / revenge-trading detection. Exact prompts not public. [uncertain]

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: structured-rules. AI-generated trading plan codifies strategy, risk limits, and psychology rules. Less 'multiple named setups with edge stats per setup' (TSB/Process Trader style); more 'one personalized plan with do's and don'ts'.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Limited. Plancana focuses on overall plan + psychology rather than per-setup edge analysis. Tagging exists but per-setup WR-by-session breakdowns are not a marketed feature. [uncertain - may exist but de-emphasized]
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes via Psychology Rules feature ('Set do's and don'ts. AI enforces them every session'). Quantified rule-following is implied but specific scoring methodology not detailed.
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Implicit — AI enforces psychology rules every session, potentially pre-entry alerts via mobile push. Not described as explicit pre-trade pressure-test of setups. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Trading Plan Builder generates personalized plan from user input; no shared template library mentioned.

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Vendor-hosted only. Read-only encrypted broker connections. No own-API-key option.
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: Approximately $12/mo (from $2.99/week pricing). Free tier available. No additional AI surcharge — AI is bundled. [uncertain - exact tier pricing not transparent]

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Only ByBit Futures (single crypto exchange). No Hyperliquid, Blofin, MEXC, OKX, or Binance support. Weak crypto coverage.
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Forex (MT4/MT5), ByBit Futures (crypto-perp), Tradelocker (CFD/futures). No stocks-native, no options.
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Not explicitly addressed in marketing. MT5 auto-sync handles closed positions but multi-TP breakdown is not a featured analytic. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Time-of-day patterns are computed at the trader level (not per-setup). No marketed 'BOS+FVG: 62% WR London' per-setup session split.

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis on psychology side; surface_metrics on technical side. Strong on emotional pattern detection (revenge, FOMO, fear) with causal narrative + action. Weaker on edge analysis per setup.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Fear-of-loss detection, Greed/FOMO oversizing detection, Revenge-trading spirals, emotional state tagging per trade sequence. Explicitly the core marketing differentiator.
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: Trading Circle: share stats with trusted trader friends privately. Limited peer-review; no formal coach-review feature.

community.community_driven_ai: Trading Circle for private stat-sharing among trusted friends. No shared-AI templates or collective insights model.
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Active in 2025-2026; mobile app updates frequent (App Store/Play Store). Specific AI-feature release cadence not public. [uncertain]
